task_completion.description: Agent opens the air monitoring report to review the chemical concentrations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or viewer showing the contents of ~/Desktop/air_monitoring_report.txt.

task_completion.description: Agent uses CAMEO Chemicals to search for chemical information.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser showing the CAMEO Chemicals website with search results or chemical data pages for the monitored chemicals.

task_completion.description: Agent documents the OSHA PEL and IDLH values for the six chemicals.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the draft or final report containing PEL and IDLH values for Toluene, Xylene, MEK, n-Hexane, Methanol, and PERC.

task_completion.description: Agent correctly identifies which zones exceed the OSHA PEL limits.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report explicitly states that Zones 2 (Xylene), 3 (MEK), 4 (n-Hexane), and 5 (Methanol) exceed the limits, while Zones 1 and 6 are within limits.

task_completion.description: Agent identifies the chemical responsible for peripheral neuropathy in Zone 4.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The report names n-Hexane as the cause of the peripheral neuropathy symptoms reported by the worker in Zone 4.

task_completion.description: Agent saves the final exceedance report with recommended corrective actions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor showing the final report saved at ~/Documents/exposure_exceedance_report.txt and containing a section for recommended corrective actions.

integrity.description: Agent actually navigated CAMEO Chemicals to find the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the CAMEO Chemicals interface, not just a general search engine or hallucinated data.

integrity.description: Agent used a text editor to create the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: The report is being typed and saved in a GUI text editor or terminal-based editor (like nano/vim), rather than just using a single echo command to dump text.

integrity.description: Agent performed genuine analysis of the exceedances.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent compared the measured values from the report against the PEL values found in CAMEO Chemicals, rather than instantly outputting the final text without checking the values.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified facts for scoring:
- Zone 1 (Toluene): 185 ppm vs PEL 200 ppm (Within limit)
- Zone 2 (Xylene): 115 ppm vs PEL 100 ppm (Exceeds)
- Zone 3 (MEK): 255 ppm vs PEL 200 ppm (Exceeds)
- Zone 4 (n-Hexane): 680 ppm vs PEL 500 ppm (Exceeds). n-Hexane is the cause of peripheral neuropathy (metabolized to 2,5-hexanedione).
- Zone 5 (Methanol): 400 ppm vs PEL 200 ppm (Exceeds)
- Zone 6 (PERC): 38 ppm vs PEL 100 ppm (Within limit)
- Output file must be saved to ~/Documents/exposure_exceedance_report.txt
